steps: Go to https://exchange.coinbase.com and sign in with your Coinbase Exchange account
Navigate to Profile > API (or go directly to https://exchange.coinbase.com/profile/api)
Set permissions for the key (View, Trade, Transfer) and restrict IP addresses if desired
Set a passphrase — you will need this for every authenticated request
Copy the API Key, Secret, and Passphrase — the Secret is shown only once
Use these three values to sign each request with HMAC-SHA256

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Coinbase Exchange API key (sent as CB-ACCESS-KEY header)

notes: Requires a Coinbase Exchange (formerly GDAX / Coinbase Pro) account with 2FA enabled
All authenticated requests require four headers: CB-ACCESS-KEY, CB-ACCESS-SIGN (HMAC-SHA256), CB-ACCESS-TIMESTAMP, and CB-ACCESS-PASSPHRASE
The signature is computed over: timestamp + method + requestPath + body
Public endpoints (e.g., /products, /currencies) do not require authentication
Your timestamp must be within 30 seconds of the server time
API keys can be scoped by permissions (View, Trade, Transfer) and IP whitelist

test_endpoint.description: List all available trading pairs — public endpoint, no auth required
